Hallmark gene sets (Human) from MSigDB

Source: R/data.R
hallmark_t2g.Rd

A two-column data frame mapping MSigDB Hallmark gene-set names to human gene symbols, as retrieved from MSigDB v2024.1 via the msigdbr package. The "HALLMARK_" prefix has been stripped from term names for brevity.

Usage

hallmark_t2g

Format

A data frame with 7,322 rows and 2 columns:

term

Character. Hallmark gene-set name ("HALLMARK_" prefix removed).

gene

Character. HGNC gene symbol.

Source

Retrieved with msigdbr(species = "Homo sapiens", collection = "H") and regenerated by inst/prepare_data/hallmark_t2g.R.

Details

This object is provided as bundled package data so that run_gsea, plot_pathways, and plot_pathway_correlation_network examples can run without an internet connection or an msigdbr installation.
